description: Enterprise knowledge integration agent for governed scientific and operational data synthesis.

conversation_starters.title: Portfolio trends
conversation_starters.text: What research trends are emerging across our approved program dashboards?

conversation_starters.text: Describe the fields and intended use of this approved research dataset.

conversation_starters.text: Summarize biomarker activity across our oncology programs.

conversation_starters.title: Warehouse query
conversation_starters.text: Run a read-only query to summarize trial enrollment by phase.

conversation_starters.title: Connector synthesis
conversation_starters.text: Combine our approved connector content with public research context for this topic.

conversation_starters.title: Data dictionary
conversation_starters.text: Explain the approved definitions behind this clinical operations metric.

disclaimer.text: Research and operational support only. Validate all outputs with approved sources and qualified experts before clinical, regulatory, or patient-impacting use.
